channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Master OAuth 2.0 & JWT: Secure Auth Deep Dive
item.description: OAuth 2.0 & JWT deep dive with benchmarks, code examples, and hard truths on revocation, PKCE, and key rotation from 10+ years of production experience.

item.title: Clean Code: Essential Rules That Actually Work
item.description: Learn how clean code rules cut bugs by 63% and build times by 48% in real-world codebases with specific metrics and tools.

item.title: How to Land a $150K Tech Job Without a Degree
item.description: Break down the $150K tech job pipeline: how self-taught engineers bypass degrees with impact portfolios and referral networks

item.title: 100 Customers Fast: Developer Growth Hack
item.description: Cold email scripts, real conversion rates, and tools that helped solo devs hit 100 paying customers in 30 days.

item.title: Safeguard Your Data
item.description: Protect your personal data from corporations with a multi-layered approach to data protection, including encryption, access control, and secure storage.

item.title: Dev Burnout Fix .
item.description: Developer burnout affects 60% of developers, causing decreased productivity

item.title: Prompt Engineering Simplified
item.description: Improve language model performance with prompt engineering

item.title: How Netflix Handles 200 Million Concurrent Streams: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to How Netflix Handles 200 Million Concurrent Streams covering production-ready implementation, real performance benchmarks, circuit breaking, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Access Law
item.description: Uncover essential web accessibility laws and coding standards in 'Access Law,' empowering you to create inclusive digital experiences for all users.

item.title: Ransomware: Hijacked
item.description: Uncover ransomware attack tactics and get expert tips to protect your data and survive a hijack.

item.title: Boost Dev Brain (April 2026)
item.description: Unlock a Second Brain as a dev: organize code, retain knowledge, and boost productivity with actionable tips.

item.title: Snowflake vs BQ vs Redshift
item.description: Compare Snowflake, BigQuery & Redshift in 2026: costs, performance & features to choose the best data warehouse for your needs.

item.title: Vision Tech (April 2026)
item.description: Explore real-world Computer Vision apps, from facial recognition to medical diagnostics, and their impact on industries.

item.title: AI Code Showdown
item.description: Compare top AI coding assistants: Copilot, Cursor, and more. Find the best fit for your coding needs.

item.title: Prevent Incidents
item.description: Prevent application downtime with proactive monitoring strategies and tools to minimize incidents and optimize performance.

item.title: Zero Trust: Bye Perimeter
item.description: Say goodbye to perimeter defense. Get insider tips on implementing Zero Trust Security for a safer network.

item.title: Netflix's Next Move
item.description: Uncover Netflix's content strategy and gain insights into their decision-making process for new shows and features.

item.title: AI on a Budget
item.description: Replace pricey software with 10 affordable AI tools, saving you money and boosting productivity.

item.title: Code in Peace
item.description: Optimize your workflow: Set up a seamless dev environment to boost productivity and reduce coding headaches.

item.title: Boost UX: Core Web Vitals
item.description: Improve user experience with optimal Core Web Vitals. Master metrics for faster page loads & higher conversions.
